what: Extend CreateProject command to reject duplicate path, non-absolute path, non-existing path, and non-git repository path with deterministic typed error mapping.

where.description: Add explicit failure branches for each invalid create condition.
Add one failing test per invalid create condition.
Define stable command error codes for route/UI mapping.

acceptance.given: A valid create command with unique valid git path
acceptance.then: The command still succeeds and produces the same result shape as TKT-04.

acceptance.given: A create command whose path already exists in repository
acceptance.then: The command fails with a duplicate-path error code and no state mutation.

patterns.name: CQRS Error Determinism
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 4, commands should produce predictable outcomes

context: Creation without strict error branches will generate inconsistent behavior between API and UI and break predictable onboarding UX.
technicalNotes: Each invalid condition must be proven by a dedicated failing test before implementation. Merge-safe: only command/error files and command tests are touched. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
